"id": "", "title": "", "description": "", "params": {"fontSize": 12, "openLinksInNewTab": false, "markdown": "## [PostgreSQL OTel] I/O Health

This dashboard monitors I/O subsystem health:
- Buffer cache hit ratio (blks_hit vs blks_read)
- Checkpoint duration and count
- Background writer buffer writes by source
- Maxwritten stops (bgwriter overwhelmed)
"}, "uiState": {}, "data": {"aggs": [], "searchSource": {"query": {"query": "", "language": "kuery"}, "filter": []}}}}}, {"panelIndex": "3fc3b54f-252d-6955-be9a-80c467b5f104", "gridData": {"x": 16, "y": 2, "w": 16, "h": 4, "i": "3fc3b54f-252d-6955-be9a-80c467b5f104"}, "type": "lens", "embeddableConfig": {"enhancements": {"dynamicActions": {"events": []}}, "hidePanelTitles": true, "attributes": {"title": "Buffer Hit Ratio", "visualizationType": "lnsMetric", "type": "lens", "references": [], "state": {"visualization": {"layerId": "8315b3f9-c7b4-2d46-fb43-2bb6cece7f6a", "layerType": "data", "metricAccessor": "a6a1ce1e-16b6-a5a4-6dca-7553e16d3ce1", "showBar": false}, "query": {"esql": "FROM metrics-postgresqlreceiver.otel-*
